notes: Day 21 (Mar 20 = NOWRUZ) UPDATE 4:15PM ET. Sources: CNN D20, AJ liveblog D19-D21, CNBC, AP, Bloomberg, Fortune, OilPrice.com, OilPriceAPI, NPR, NBC, Wikipedia, Investing.com, IAEA, Euronews, NCRI, Iran International, Carnegie, Windward, PBS, UNHCR, Zelenskyy, Hengaw 5th report, FDD, HRW, JPost, Fox News, Britannica, NetBlocks, Militarnyi, TWZ, USNI News, EU Kallas, HRANA, Red Cross, ACLED, IranWire, Queen Farah Pahlavi.

NOWRUZ — MOJTABA ABSENT: Hard deadline passed. No video Nowruz message from Supreme Leader — only written statements read by TV anchor. Euronews: 'if no Nowruz message appears, it would signal significant shifts within Tehran's power structure.' Iran International: 'an empty entity who does not appear in public.' Trump: 'is not alive.' Hegseth: 'likely disfigured.' First written statement had typographical errors — JPost: 'dictated by IRGC.' Succession crisis CONFIRMED on the most symbolic day of Iranian calendar.

CHAHARSHANBE SURI — NIGHT OF DEFIANCE: Chaharshanbe Suri turned NATIONWIDE act of defiance. 111 'pro-monarchy cells' arrested in 26/31 provinces. 'Death to Mojtaba' + 'Long live the Shah' + 'Death to Islamic Republic' chants from homes (Tehran Saadat Abad confirmed). Carnegie: largest potential uprising since 1979. War + Nowruz + succession = triple internal pressure.

IRGC DESERTIONS DOCUMENTED (Wikipedia article created): Rising desertions within IRGC and police now MULTI-SOURCE CONFIRMED (Iran International, Militarnyi, Wikipedia). Desertions recorded in Isfahan and Tabriz, not just lower ranks. 4 Iranian diplomats applied for asylum in Western countries. Group desertions at conscript level — soldiers leaving bases. Some units issued only 20 bullets per 2 Artesh soldiers. Reports of IRGC EXECUTING soldiers for desertion. IRGC denying aid to Artesh units. Army-IRGC rift deepening. NYT (D17): 'no evidence of significant desertion' — but subsequent reports contradict. Pezeshkian warned of severe economic strain; IRGC dismissed. Pezeshkian APOLOGIZED to neighboring states for Oman strikes but IRGC continued attacks — exposing leadership rift.

OMAN — WIKIPEDIA ARTICLE CREATED: Attacks ongoing since D2 (Mar 1). Wikipedia '2026 Iranian strikes on Oman' now documents: D2 Duqm Port 2 drones, tanker Skylight hit off Khasab (4 injured); D3 tanker attacked off Muscat (1 killed); D14 Sohar drone strike (2 killed); Salalah port fuel tanks hit (operations suspended). Total: 3 killed, 5+ injured. Araghchi said attacks 'not their choice' — IRGC units acting independently. Pezeshkian apologized but IRGC continued. Oman neutral throughout — this expansion alienates last Gulf diplomatic channel to Iran.

OIL SURGING D21: Brent rallied from ~$110 overnight to ~$116 (OilPriceAPI live). OilPrice.com: $112.21. Surge driven by cumulative supply anxiety: Oman + SAMREF + Kuwait refineries + Qatar LNG + Hormuz near-closure. Brent up ~80% since war began. Citi: $120+ near-term. EIA: >$95 next 2 months. March average: $93.05 vs $70.89 Feb.

HORMUZ UPDATE: 21 tankers total since D1 (vs 100+/day pre-war). 89 ships crossed Mar 1-15 (Lloyd's List). US Navy NOT READY to escort — TWZ: 8-10 destroyers needed per convoy, could restore only ~10% of pre-war traffic. US dropped 5,000-lb deep penetrator bunker busters on hardened Iranian anti-ship cruise missile sites along Hormuz (CENTCOM). Energy Sec Wright deleted then retracted escort claim; WH denied any escort occurred. ~400 vessels stranded. Iran exporting 16M+ bbl to China. Kuwait official totals: 539 drones + 227 missiles.

HENGAW 5TH REPORT: 5,300 killed through D18 (511 civilians = 9.6%, 4,789 military). 120 minors, 160 women among civilian dead. 178 cities across 25 provinces struck. 223 military installations hit. Hormozgan school massacre = highest civilian toll. IRGC relocating to schools, mosques, dormitories — IHL violation documented.

LEBANON ~1,000+: Health Ministry (D19): 968 killed, 2,432 wounded. Crossing 1,000. 1M+ displaced (19% pop). Israel ground ops since D17. UN: attacks on residential buildings may constitute war crimes. HRW: 'complete impunity.'

INTERNET BLACKOUT ~480+ HOURS (NetBlocks: 'longest recorded shutdown in Iran's history,' 20th day as of D20). Israel using Iranian social media to geolocate and strike Basij checkpoints — new tactic. ~300 Basij commanders killed in targeted drone waves. 350 Starlink terminals CONFISCATED being smuggled into Iran. 21 arrested for sending videos to foreign media.

HRANA CROSS-REFERENCE: HRANA documented 3,114 deaths by D18 (1,354 civilians, 1,138 military, 622 unclassified). Vs Hengaw 5,300 (511 civilians, 4,789 military). Divergence suggests: HRANA lower civilian count but higher civilian RATIO (43% vs 9.6%). Both agree military casualties 'significantly higher than reported.' Red Cross: 'families gathering for funerals instead of festivities.' Queen Farah Pahlavi: Nowruz coincides with 'great awakening.'

PATRIOT SUPPLY CRISIS (Zelenskyy): 800+ Patriot missiles fired on D1 alone. US manufactures only 60-65 per month. Coalition consuming interceptors faster than production — structural limit on air defense. Zelensky: Putin counting on prolonged Iran war to sap Western stockpiles.

WARTIME PROSECUTION: Qazvin prosecutor announced wartime conditions — arrested protesters detained until late June 2027. Fars: some in Karaj arrested for 'burning images of martyred supreme leader.' Wartime legal framework = unprecedented repression tool.

DIPLOMACY: Araghchi: 'never asked for ceasefire.' Trump: 'eager to negotiate but not ready.' EU Kallas: 'We need an exit from the Iran war, not an escalation.' Netanyahu posted Nowruz greeting to Iranian people ('new beginning of hope'). Israel KILLED LARIJANI (pragmatic negotiator who led pre-war nuclear talks) — analysts: aimed at closing diplomatic avenues. Macron moratorium. South Pars trigger. Kataib Hezbollah 5-day pause.

sitrep: NOWRUZ — MOJTABA ABSENT (SUCCESSION CRISIS CONFIRMED): Hard deadline passed. No video Nowruz message — only written statements. Euronews: absence 'would signal significant shifts in Tehran's power structure.' Iran International: 'empty entity.' Trump: 'is not alive.' Hegseth: 'likely disfigured.' JPost: first written statement had errors, 'dictated by IRGC.' On the most symbolic day of Iranian calendar, the Supreme Leader is invisible. Power vacuum confirmed.

CHAHARSHANBE SURI — NIGHT OF DEFIANCE: Chaharshanbe Suri turned nationwide protest. 'Death to Mojtaba' + 'Long live the Shah' + 'Death to Islamic Republic' chants (Tehran Saadat Abad confirmed). 111 'pro-monarchy cells' arrested in 26/31 provinces. Carnegie: largest potential uprising since 1979. Netanyahu Nowruz congratulations to Iranian people. Pahlavi called diaspora solidarity. War + Nowruz + succession = triple pressure.

OMAN PORTS HIT — NEW GEOGRAPHIC EXPANSION: Several drones struck Oman's ports of Duqm and Salalah, damaging at least one fuel storage tank. CRITICAL: Oman has been NEUTRAL throughout conflict. This represents IRGC targeting expanding beyond belligerent/allied states. Oman = key alternative shipping hub. If Oman route compromised: Gulf states lose another bypass option. War now spans: Gulf + Red Sea + Oman Sea + Caspian = ALL of Iran's surrounding maritime space.

SAMREF REFINERY HIT — IRGC NAMED TARGET EXECUTED: Saudi Arabia confirmed drone struck SAMREF refinery in Yanbu on Red Sea coast (Saudi Aramco/ExxonMobil JV, ~400K bbl/day capacity). SAMREF was SPECIFICALLY NAMED by IRGC as target on D19. Target execution scorecard: Kuwait Mina al-Ahmadi ✓, Kuwait Mina Abdullah ✓, Qatar several LNG ✓, SAMREF ✓. Remaining named: Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn. Red Sea coast reached = East-West Pipeline bypass compromised.

SELECTIVE HORMUZ PASSAGE FRAMEWORK: China, India, Pakistan, Turkey negotiating bilateral passage with Iran. March 16: only 2 crossings (Windward), 97% below normal. ~400 vessels waiting in Gulf of Oman. Iran exporting 16M+ barrels to China since March — Beijing largest buyer. Iran using Kooh Mobarak terminal to bypass Hormuz for its own exports. Permission-based framework crystallizing: allies get passage, US-aligned blocked.

OIL SURGING — BRENT ~$116: D21 rallied from $110 overnight to ~$116 (OilPriceAPI live). Up ~80% since war began. March avg $93.05 vs Feb $70.89. Only 21 tankers since D1 (vs 100+/day). US Navy 'not ready' to escort — Energy Sec: 'possibly by end of March.' Citi: $120+. EIA: >$95/b next 2 months. Gulf exports ↓61%. Russia BENEFITING.

200+ UKRAINIAN ANTI-DRONE EXPERTS: Zelenskyy confirmed deployment to Gulf states. Operational expertise from Russia-Ukraine war applied to Iranian drone defense. First major non-NATO military assistance to Gulf. Potential game-changer for Gulf air defense if sustained.

IRGC FRACTURING — NOW DOCUMENTED: Wikipedia article '2026 defection and desertion of Iranian security forces' created. Iran International + Militarnyi confirm desertions in Isfahan and Tabriz, not just lower ranks. 4 Iranian diplomats applied for asylum in Western countries. Group desertions at conscript level — soldiers leaving bases seeking refuge in towns. Supply crisis: some units issued only 20 bullets per 2 Artesh soldiers, no water/food. Reports of IRGC EXECUTING soldiers for desertion. IRGC denying aid to Artesh units — Army-IRGC rift deepening. Pezeshkian apologized to neighbors for Oman strikes but IRGC continued. Israel using social media to geolocate and strike Basij checkpoints — ~300 Basij commanders killed. NYT (D17): 'no evidence of significant desertion' — but subsequent multi-source reporting contradicts.

IRAN: 3.2 MILLION DISPLACED (UNHCR). Hengaw 5th report (D18): 5,300 killed (511 civilians = 9.6%, 4,789 military). HRANA cross-ref: 3,114 deaths (1,354 civilians = 43%). Divergence = methodological, but both confirm massive toll. 120 minors, 160 women among civilian dead. 178 cities across 25 provinces struck. 223 military installations hit. Health Ministry: 1,444 + 18,551 injured. Internet blackout ~480+ hours. 350 Starlink terminals confiscated. 21 arrested for sending videos abroad. IRGC relocating to schools, mosques, dormitories — IHL violation documented. 25 hospitals damaged, 9 out of service. Red Cross: 'families gathering for funerals instead of festivities.' Population NOT broken — Chaharshanbe Suri proves resilience. Queen Farah Pahlavi: 'great awakening.'

DIPLOMACY — AVENUES CLOSING: FM Araghchi: 'never asked for ceasefire.' Israel KILLED LARIJANI — pragmatic negotiator who led pre-war nuclear talks. Analysts: aimed at closing diplomatic avenues. Trump: 'eager to negotiate but not ready.' EU Kallas: 'We need an exit, not an escalation.' Netanyahu posted Nowruz greeting to Iranian people ('new beginning of hope'). Macron energy moratorium. South Pars trigger. Kataib Hezbollah 5-day pause = first crack in proxy unity.

LEBANON ~1,000+ KILLED: Health Ministry (D19): 968 killed, 2,432 wounded. Crossing 1,000 with continued strikes. 1M+ displaced (19% pop). Litani bridges destroyed. Ground ops expanding. German chancellor: 'error.'

KENT + HORMUZ: Former NCTC director: 'no intelligence' of imminent Iranian attack. FBI investigating. Kuwait official totals: 539 drones + 227 missiles targeting country. UAE (D17): 1,627 drones + 319 missiles launched; 8 killed, 157 injured. UN WFP: war driving 'significant long-term increases in global food prices.' IEA: 'largest supply disruption in history.'

dailyRows.primary: UAE 9 ballistic + 33 drones intercepted (AJ). Qatar 4 ballistic + drones. Saudi 51 drones — LARGEST single-day barrage targeting kingdom. Kuwait airport drones. Jordan: 79/85 intercepted over week 2.
dailyRows.capability: 20+70. DRONE VOLUME TICKED UP — Saudi's 51-drone barrage a significant escalation. Kharg Island: 90+ military targets struck by CENTCOM (sparing oil). White House: ballistic ↓90%, drones ↓95%, 65+ vessels sunk.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $103.14 Fri close (CNBC). Fujairah oil hub fire from drone debris. IRGC declares UAE bases 'legitimate targets.' Trump 'not ready for deal.' May hit Kharg 'a few more times just for fun.'
dailyRows.assessment: Drone escalation despite missile depletion. Saudi barrage = Iran still has UAV stockpile. Kharg strike shows coalition restraint on oil — but for how long?

dailyRows.primary: Heaviest single-night bombardment since D1: Isfahan, Shiraz (20+ explosions), Tehran, Dezful, Khomein, Hamedan, Jask port. 6+ provinces. 10+ hypersonic missiles at Israel.
dailyRows.capability: 25+60. IRGC fires 10+ HYPERSONIC missiles at Israel — capability escalation. Israel critically low on ballistic interceptors (Semafor). IDF: 7,600+ strikes in Iran, 1,100+ in Lebanon cumul.
dailyRows.cost: 15+ killed Isfahan. Shiraz residential areas hit. 10,000+ homes destroyed (Tehran governor). 56 cultural sites damaged. Pope calls ceasefire. Pahlavi outlines transition. Houthis threaten Red Sea resumption.
dailyRows.assessment: Hypersonic escalation + interceptor crisis = war's most dangerous moment since D1. Houthi threat = potential second maritime chokepoint.

dailyRows.primary: Israel new Tehran strikes (smoke over capital). Dubai airport drone fire (flights suspended→limited). Abu Dhabi missile kill. Fujairah drone fire. Saudi 37 drones intercepted (AJ). Baghdad airport rockets. Israel: 245 attack waves total.
dailyRows.capability: DRONE VOLUME SURGED — Saudi 37 drones alone is highest single-day count from kingdom. IRGC claims most weapons cache intact and hasn't used post-2025 missiles yet. If true, Iran's offensive depth is much greater than ↓90% suggests. Israel planning 3+ more weeks of strikes.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $106+. Gulf exports ↓61% (Reuters/Kpler). US wounded revised to ~200. Hormuz coalition failing — Australia, Japan, Germany all declined. G5 'gravely concerned' re Lebanon. Trump threatens NATO umbrella + Xi summit.
dailyRows.assessment: IRGC 'arsenal intact' claim is the most significant D17 development. If true, Iran has been deliberately rationing — using old stock while preserving modern missiles. This reframes the entire attrition narrative. War may have much longer tail than assumed.

dailyRows.primary: DECAPITATION: Larijani + Soleimani confirmed killed. UAE full airspace closure. Qatar 13/14 ballistic intercepted. Saudi 12+ drones. Baghdad Al-Rasheed Hotel + embassy targeted. Abu Dhabi 1 killed. Tanker struck off Fujairah. Israel ground invasion of Lebanon.
dailyRows.capability: Decapitation accelerating but Qatar 13/14 ballistic missiles = Iran still has meaningful ballistic capability. IRGC 'cache intact' claim from D16 gaining credibility. Israel ground ops in Lebanon = second full front.
dailyRows.cost: Joe Kent (NCTC director) resigned — 'Iran not a threat.' Trump: don't need NATO. Delayed China trip 1 month. France: 'never' Hormuz during war. Amnesty: 170+ schoolgirls killed in US strike.
dailyRows.assessment: Crosscurrents: Military decapitation vs economic leverage. Israel destroying command structure but Iran's remaining capability + Hormuz control = strategic stalemate. First tanker transit could signal beginning of negotiated passage framework.

dailyRows.primary: ENERGY + NUCLEAR WAR: Israel struck South Pars (AM). Iran hit Ras Laffan LNG TWICE (PM). Bushehr NPP 'hostile projectile' (IAEA: no reactor damage, Rosatom suspended construction). 5th senior kill (Basij head + Khatib). Kuwait 4 ballistic + 20 drones. Multi-warhead at Israel (2 killed). Saudi 4 ballistic at Riyadh DURING FM meeting + drone at gas facility.
dailyRows.capability: ENERGY WAR FULLY MUTUAL + NUCLEAR DIMENSION. Ras Laffan x2, South Pars, Bushehr NPP all hit in single day. Iran named specific Gulf targets (Samref, Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn). Multi-warhead Khorramshahr-4 + Qadr. Israel striking northern Iran. D19 missile count REVISED UP from 35→40 on 2nd Ras Laffan confirmation.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $107.38 close (CNBC), spiked $111+ after-hours. Gas $3.84 (+29%). Fed held rates. Pentagon $200B+. Qatar expelled attaches. Saudi: 'right to military action.' 12 FM joint statement. E3 backing military defense. Hengaw: 5,300 dead. Lebanon 880+. Kataib Hezbollah conditional pause. IMO emergency meeting.
dailyRows.assessment: INFLECTION: Energy + nuclear. Bushehr projectile = nuclear-adjacent escalation. Ras Laffan x2 = Qatar's LNG industry threatened. E3 military backing + 12 FM statement + Saudi warning = diplomatic momentum toward intervention OR escalation. Kataib Hezbollah pause offer = first crack in Iran proxy unity. IMO corridor = international shipping institutions mobilizing. Every constraint dissolving simultaneously.

dailyRows.primary: SAMREF HIT + ENERGY WAR CONTINUES: Kuwait TWO refineries ablaze (Mina al-Ahmadi + Mina Abdullah). QatarEnergy: 'several' LNG facilities. SAMREF refinery (Yanbu, Red Sea) hit by drone — IRGC named target EXECUTED. 6th salvo at Israel. Kuwait 4 ballistic + 25+ drones. Saudi Al-Kharj 2 killed. Gabbard contradicts Trump. IAEA: 440kg = ~10 weapons. Bandar Anzali heavy bombardment.
dailyRows.capability: D20 REVISED: 45 missiles + 80 drones. SAMREF = FIRST Red Sea coast target. IRGC executing named target list: Kuwait ✓ Qatar ✓ SAMREF ✓. Remaining: Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn. 6 salvos at Israel since midnight = maintaining pressure. CENTCOM: 7,800+ targets. Bandar Anzali warships destroyed.
dailyRows.cost: Brent surged $119.11 intraday (CNBC), settled ~$114 close. Citi: $120+. SAMREF 'impact minimal' per Aramco but symbolic significance enormous — Red Sea coast reached. Gabbard contradicts Trump. Kent FBI probe. Saudi FM 'trust shattered.' Pezeshkian resignation crisis. Swedish execution. Pentagon $200B+.
dailyRows.assessment: SAMREF is the inflection within the inflection. IRGC's named targets are being systematically executed. Red Sea coast = drones can reach Saudi Arabia's western export infrastructure, not just Gulf-facing facilities. This means pipeline bypass routes (East-West Pipeline to Yanbu) are no longer safe. The energy war has NO geographic limit within Saudi Arabia. Combined with Kuwait refineries + Qatar LNG = comprehensive assault on Gulf energy architecture.

dailyRows.primary: NOWRUZ — DAY 21 + MOJTABA ABSENT + IRGC FRACTURES: Hard deadline passed — no video Nowruz message from Supreme Leader. Chaharshanbe Suri 'Night of Defiance' — 'Death to Mojtaba' + 'Long live the Shah' chants (Saadat Abad confirmed). 111 arrests in 26/31 provinces. Oman ports (Duqm, Salalah) hit — Iran DENIED responsibility. IRGC desertions DOCUMENTED (multi-source). Pezeshkian-IRGC rift over economy. Israel using social media to geolocate Basij — ~300 commanders killed. 200+ Ukrainian experts in Gulf.
dailyRows.capability: D21: 40+72 (Oman theater). IRGC FRACTURE NOW DOCUMENTED: Wikipedia article on desertions created. Multi-source confirmed (Isfahan, Tabriz). 4 diplomats asylum. IRGC executing deserters. Supply crisis: 20 bullets/2 soldiers. Army-IRGC rift: IRGC denying Artesh aid. Pezeshkian apologized for Oman but IRGC continued. US dropped 5,000-lb bunker busters on Hormuz anti-ship sites. Target execution: 4/7. ~300 Basij commanders killed via social media geolocating.
dailyRows.cost: Brent SURGING ~$116 (up from $110 overnight). Up ~80% since war began. Only 21 tankers since D1. US Navy escort 'not ready.' Chaharshanbe Suri = IRGC TWO FRONTS. 111 arrests = massive security diversion. WARTIME PROSECUTION: detained until June 2027. 350 Starlink terminals confiscated. Carnegie: 1979 potential. Hengaw: 5,300 killed. HRANA: 3,114. 3.2M displaced. Internet ~480+ hrs. PATRIOT CRISIS: 800+ fired D1, 60-65/month production (Zelenskyy). Trump: 'eager to negotiate... not ready yet.' Kataib Hezbollah 5-day pause = first proxy crack. Queen Farah: 'great awakening.'
dailyRows.assessment: NOWRUZ INFLECTION — THREE SIMULTANEOUS FRACTURES: (1) LEADERSHIP: Mojtaba absent on Nowruz = succession crisis irrefutable. Netanyahu greeting Iranian people. Israel killed Larijani = closing diplomatic avenues. (2) MILITARY: Desertions NOW DOCUMENTED (Wikipedia, multi-source). 4 diplomats asylum. IRGC executing deserters. Supply crisis: 20 bullets/2 soldiers. Army-IRGC rift. US 5,000-lb bunker busters on Hormuz missile sites. Internet ~480+ hrs (NetBlocks: longest in history). (3) POLITICAL: Pezeshkian APOLOGIZED for Oman but IRGC continued = rift PUBLIC. EU Kallas: 'exit not escalation.' Combined with Chaharshanbe Suri's nationwide defiance, oil at $116, and 21 tankers in 21 days: the regime faces its most comprehensive crisis since 1979. The question is no longer IF IRGC fractures but HOW FAST.

timeline.title: Week 3 (Mar 16–22)
timeline.body: IRGC FRACTURING + OIL $116 + MOJTABA ABSENT: Nowruz hard deadline passed — no video message. Chaharshanbe Suri 'Night of Defiance.' 111 arrests in 26/31 provinces. 'Long live the Shah.' IRGC desertions reported. Pezeshkian-IRGC rift. Iran DENIED Oman attacks (new behavior). Israel killing Basij via social media geolocating (~300 commanders). Brent $107→$119→$110→$116. Only 21 tankers since D1. US Navy 'not ready.' Hengaw: 5,300 killed. Kataib Hezbollah 5-day pause. Trump: 'eager to negotiate but not ready.' Target scorecard 4/7.

timeline.title: Week 4–5 (Mar 23–Apr 5)
timeline.body: IRGC remaining targets = critical: Jubail (world's largest industrial city), Mesaieed (Qatar petrochemicals), Al Hosn (UAE gas). If struck: Brent $130+, Saudi military entry triggered, total Gulf shutdown. POST-NOWRUZ PROTESTS = key variable. If Chaharshanbe Suri defiance escalates: IRGC faces two-front crisis. Mojtaba's continued absence = succession unresolved. Ukrainian anti-drone deployment: does it shift Gulf defense balance? Selective Hormuz passage: does it evolve into formal framework or collapse? Congress $200B+ supplemental fight.

timeline.title: Month 2 (Apr–May)
timeline.body: Three crises converge: (1) Energy — IRGC target execution vs improved Gulf defenses (Ukrainian experts) + Macron moratorium; (2) Nuclear — Isfahan underground + IAEA locked out = breakout window; (3) Internal — post-Nowruz protest wave + succession crisis + IRGC two-front strain. US missile supply becomes binding constraint. Hormuz permission-based framework either formalizes (China/India corridor) or collapses.

timeline.title: Month 3+ (May onward)
timeline.body: If IRGC completes target list: permanent regional restructuring. Saudi entry = wider war. If post-Nowruz internal pressure sustains: IRGC faces existential two-front challenge. Nuclear verification crisis defines decade. Oman neutrality violated = regional alignment shifts. No clean outcome available.

timeline.title: Endgame variables
timeline.body: IRGC remaining targets (Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn). Post-Nowruz protest trajectory. Saudi military entry decision. Mojtaba's condition / succession. Ukrainian anti-drone impact. Selective Hormuz evolution. Macron energy moratorium. Trump South Pars trigger. US missile resupply. Isfahan nuclear. Congress $200B+. Lebanon Litani. Oman neutrality.

timeline_fa.body: جبیل، مسیعید، الحصن. نوروز بعد اعتراض. عربستان. مجتبی. اوکراین دفاع. هرمز. ماکرون. ترامپ پارس جنوبی. موشک. اصفهان. کنگره. لبنان. عمان.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Escalation spiral / total war
scenarioProbabilities.body: DECREASED from 40%→38%. IRGC fracture signals = external escalation capacity degrading. PATRIOT supply crisis = coalition also degrading. Desertions + Basij decimation (~300 commanders) + Pezeshkian rift + Mojtaba absent = institutional coherence declining. Iran DENYING Oman (new behavior) = diplomatic damage control, not escalation posture. BUT: 4/7 targets hit, remaining 3 (Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn) could still be struck by autonomous IRGC units. Trump South Pars trigger. Oil at $116 NOT deterring IRGC. If remaining targets hit: $130+, Saudi entry. Probability decreased because IRGC capacity to execute is degrading, NOT because intent has changed.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Protracted attrition + internal crisis
scenarioProbabilities.body: INCREASED from 22%→24%. IRGC fractures + two fronts + Hormuz 21 tankers = war grinding. Desertions + Basij losses degrade both external and internal capacity. US Navy NOT READY to escort = blockade persists. NEW: PATRIOT SUPPLY CRISIS (Zelenskyy: 800+ fired D1, 60-65/month production) = coalition air defense structurally unsustainable. Putin counting on this drain. Oil at $116. Kataib Hezbollah 5-day pause. Ukrainian anti-drone experts improving Gulf defenses. Wartime prosecution framework = regime digging in. Neither side achieves decisive outcome. This scenario GAINING probability because Patriot depletion + IRGC fracture = MUTUAL attrition, not one-sided.

scenarioProbabilities.name: International intervention / ceasefire
scenarioProbabilities.body: UNCHANGED at 15%. Iran denying Oman = regime aware of diplomatic cost. UN: Lebanon strikes 'may constitute war crimes.' WFP: global food price crisis from Hormuz. Trump: 'eager to negotiate but not ready' = back-channel exists. IRGC fractures could produce Iranian negotiation partner — but not yet. Most likely form: maritime corridor imposed unilaterally.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Declared victory + exit
scenarioProbabilities.body: INCREASED from 8%. IRGC fracture signals could enable exit narrative: 'regime is crumbling, mission accomplished.' Trump AF1: 'eager to negotiate' = testing exit framing. $116 oil + $200B+ cost + 13 US KIA = domestic pressure mounting. Kent FBI probe undermines war rationale. IRGC desertions (if confirmed) + Mojtaba absent = 'Iran is defeated' narrative more plausible. BUT: IRGC still executing target list, Hormuz still closed.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Regime fracture / IRGC collapse
scenarioProbabilities.body: INCREASED from 8%→11%. NOWRUZ UPDATE: ALL fracture indicators accelerating. (1) Mojtaba absent on Nowruz = no authority figure. (2) IRGC desertions NOW DOCUMENTED — Wikipedia article, multi-source confirmed (Isfahan, Tabriz), 4 diplomats asylum, IRGC executing deserters. (3) Pezeshkian APOLOGIZED to neighbors but IRGC continued = leadership rift PUBLIC. (4) ~300 Basij commanders killed = suppression degrading. (5) Supply crisis: 20 bullets/2 soldiers, no water/food. (6) Army-IRGC rift: IRGC denying aid to Artesh. (7) 111 arrests in 26/31 provinces = national movement. (8) 'Long live the Shah' chants. Carnegie: 1979. Internet ~480+ hours. Desertions now CONFIRMED by multiple sources — upgrading from 'significant if true' to 'documented phenomenon, scale debated.' IRGC faces existential choice. This scenario = 'emerging possibility.'

scenarioProbabilities.name: Negotiated deal
scenarioProbabilities.body: UNCHANGED. Araghchi: 'never asked for ceasefire, never asked for negotiation.' Definitive. IRGC dictatorship = no civilian partner. Selective Hormuz passage (China/India/Turkey) = backdoor partial normalization without formal deal. Most likely 'deal' is de facto: selective passage + energy moratorium + informal ceasefire — without any formal agreement.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: مارپیچ تشدید / جنگ تمام‌عیار
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: کاهش ۴۰→۳۸. سپاه شکاف + بحران پاتریوت = هر دو طرف تحلیل. فرار + بسیج ۳۰۰. عمان انکار. ۴ از ۷.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: فرسایشی + بحران داخلی
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: افزایش ۲۲→۲۴. پاتریوت ۸۰۰+ روز اول / ۶۰-۶۵ ماه = دفاع محدود. فرسایش دوطرفه. نافرمانی + دو جبهه. هرمز.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: مداخله بین‌المللی
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: افزایش. ماکرون + IMO + عمان بی‌طرفی = خط قرمز جدید.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: اعلام پیروزی + خروج
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: افزایش. سپاه شکاف = 'مأموریت تمام.' ترامپ: 'مشتاق مذاکره.' نفت ۱۱۶ + ۲۰۰+ = فشار داخلی.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: شکست رژیم / فروپاشی سپاه
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: افزایش. مجتبی غایب + فرار + بسیج ۳۰۰ + پزشکیان اختلاف + عمان انکار + 'زنده‌باد شاه.' کارنگی: ۱۹۷۹. از 'غیرمنتظره' به 'نوظهور.'

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: مذاکره
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: عراقچی: 'هرگز.' هرمز گزینشی = عملی بدون رسمی.

theoryEvaluation.title: IRGC FRACTURING — three simultaneous crises
theoryEvaluation.body: The Nowruz paradox has been confirmed AND exceeded expectations. Three simultaneous fracture lines: (1) LEADERSHIP: Mojtaba's Nowruz absence = succession crisis irrefutable. Written statements with typos = IRGC ventriloquism confirmed. Trump: 'is not alive.' Netanyahu posted Nowruz greeting to Iranian people. (2) MILITARY: Desertions NOW DOCUMENTED — Wikipedia article created, Iran International + Militarnyi confirm Isfahan/Tabriz desertions. 4 diplomats seeking asylum. Group conscript desertions. IRGC EXECUTING deserters. Supply crisis: 20 bullets per 2 soldiers, no water/food. Army-IRGC aid denial. Israel's social media geolocating killing ~300 Basij commanders = enforcement capacity degrading. (3) POLITICAL: Pezeshkian APOLOGIZED to neighbors for Oman strikes but IRGC continued — leadership rift exposed publicly. EU Kallas: 'exit not escalation.' Israel killed Larijani (pragmatic negotiator) = closing diplomatic avenues. Combined with 111 arrests in 26/31 provinces, Carnegie's 1979 comparison: IRGC faces the most comprehensive institutional crisis since founding. Critical: can IRGC sustain external war, suppress dissent, AND manage leadership vacuum with degraded Basij, supply crisis, and fragmenting command?

theoryEvaluation.title: Oman expansion — war beyond belligerents
theoryEvaluation.body: Drone strikes on Oman's Duqm and Salalah ports represent a QUALITATIVE expansion. Oman has been neutral throughout the conflict — it hosted pre-war diplomacy and the Feb 27 'breakthrough.' Attacking neutral Oman: (1) alienates the only Gulf state that maintained a channel to Iran, (2) threatens alternative shipping routes (Duqm and Salalah were being used as bypass hubs), (3) demonstrates IRGC willingness to attack ANY infrastructure, regardless of political alignment. Combined with the Bahrain-Saudi bridge damage, this means every maritime and pipeline route in the region is now at risk. The war has expanded from Gulf + Red Sea + Caspian to include Oman Sea = effectively ALL of Iran's surrounding maritime space. Geographic containment of the conflict is failing.

theoryEvaluation.title: Hormuz: 21 tankers in 21 days — selective blockade crystallized
theoryEvaluation.body: Hard data now available: only 21 tankers have transited Hormuz since D1, vs 100+/day pre-war. 89 ships total (including non-tankers) crossed Mar 1-15 (Lloyd's List). US Navy 'NOT READY' to escort tankers — Energy Sec Wright: 'possibly by end of March.' Treasury Sec Bessent confirmed US allowing Iranian tankers through. Iran continues exporting 16M+ barrels to China (~$1B+ revenue for IRGC via dark fleet). ~400 vessels stranded. IRGC deploying naval mines — US destroyed 30+ mine-laying vessels but Iran adapting with smaller boats. The selective blockade is now QUANTIFIED: Iran's trade partners (China, India, Pakistan, Turkey) get bilateral passage; US-aligned nations blocked. NEW DIMENSION — PATRIOT SUPPLY CRISIS (Zelenskyy): 800+ Patriot missiles fired on D1 alone, but US manufactures only 60-65/month. Coalition consuming interceptors faster than production = structural air defense limit. Putin counting on prolonged war to deplete Western stockpiles. Kuwait official totals (539 drones, 227 missiles) show IRGC's Gulf campaign continuing.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: سپاه شکاف — سه بحران همزمان
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: رهبری: مجتبی غایب نوروز = بحران جانشینی. نظامی: فرار + بسیج ۳۰۰ فرمانده = سرکوب داخلی ضعیف. سیاسی: پزشکیان-سپاه اختلاف. عمان انکار = رفتار جدید. ۱۱۱ بازداشت. کارنگی: ۱۹۷۹. سؤال: سپاه سه بحران = توان؟

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: عمان: جنگ فراتر از طرفین
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: دقم + صلاله = بی‌طرف حمله. عمان = کانال دیپلماتیک بود. مسیرهای جایگزین تهدید. خلیج + دریای سرخ + خزر + عمان = همه فضای دریایی.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: هرمز: ۲۱ نفتکش در ۲۱ روز
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: داده سخت: ۲۱ نفتکش vs ۱۰۰+/روز. نیروی دریایی آمریکا آماده نیست — 'شاید آخر مارس.' ۴۰۰ کشتی. بحران پاتریوت: ۸۰۰+ روز اول، فقط ۶۰-۶۵/ماه تولید. پوتین = جنگ طولانی = ذخیره غرب. کویت: ۵۳۹ پهپاد + ۲۲۷ موشک.

endstate.title: Most likely (38%)
endstate.body: Escalation spiral — FURTHER DECREASED 40%→38%. IRGC fracture signals (desertions, Basij decimation, Pezeshkian rift, Mojtaba absent) degrade escalation capacity. NEW: PATRIOT supply crisis (800+ fired D1, 60-65/month production) = coalition ALSO degrading. Mutual attrition now. Iran denying Oman = damage control. BUT: 4/7 targets hit, autonomous IRGC units could still strike. Oil at $116 not deterring. Probability shifts toward protracted scenario because BOTH sides face structural limits.

endstate.title: Second (24%)
endstate.body: Protracted attrition + internal crisis — INCREASED 22%→24%. IRGC fractures + two fronts + Hormuz (21 tankers/21 days) = war grinding. NEW: PATRIOT SUPPLY CRISIS makes this scenario MORE LIKELY — coalition air defense structurally unsustainable at current rates (Zelenskyy: 800+ fired D1 vs 60-65/month). Putin counting on drain. US Navy NOT READY. Wartime prosecution = regime digging in for long haul. Kataib Hezbollah 5-day pause. Neither side achieves decisive outcome. GAINING probability as mutual attrition becomes evident.

endstate.title: Emerging (15%)
endstate.body: International intervention. Oman neutrality violated = new red line. Macron moratorium + IMO corridor + selective Hormuz = multiple frameworks. Global urgency at $110+ oil. But: no Iranian partner. Most likely: unilateral maritime corridor OR energy moratorium. Oman attack may accelerate diplomatic action.

endstate.title: Emerging (11%)
endstate.body: Regime fracture / IRGC collapse — UPGRADED from 'wild card.' ALL fracture indicators now present: Mojtaba absent on Nowruz, desertions reported, Basij ~300 commanders killed, Pezeshkian rift, Iran denying Oman, 'Long live the Shah' chants. Carnegie: 1979. Moved from 8% to 11%. If post-Nowruz protests sustain AND desertions confirmed: IRGC faces existential choice. Also possible: IRGC hits all remaining targets in desperate escalation before capacity fully degrades = oil $150+, total Gulf shutdown.

endstate_fa.title: محتمل‌ترین (۳۸٪)
endstate_fa.body: مارپیچ تشدید — کاهش بیشتر ۴۰→۳۸. سپاه شکاف + بحران پاتریوت = فرسایش دوطرفه. عمان انکار. ۴ از ۷.

endstate_fa.title: دوم (۲۴٪)
endstate_fa.body: فرسایشی — افزایش ۲۲→۲۴. پاتریوت بحران = فرسایش دوطرفه. ۲۱ نفتکش. محاکمه جنگی = رژیم حفر. هر دو طرف = محدود.

endstate_fa.title: نوظهور (۱۵٪)
endstate_fa.body: مداخله. عمان بی‌طرفی = خط قرمز. ماکرون + IMO. اما بدون شریک ایرانی.

endstate_fa.title: نوظهور (۱۱٪)
endstate_fa.body: شکست سپاه — ارتقا از 'غیرمنتظره.' مجتبی غایب + فرار + بسیج + پزشکیان + 'زنده‌باد شاه.' کارنگی: ۱۹۷۹. از ۸٪ به ۱۱٪.
